title: DENTAL - 211info
text: JOHNSON DENTAL CLINIC DENTAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for overall health and prevention such as cleanings, x-rays, fillings, extractions, periodontics, and dental health education. 1112 NW Circle Boulevard Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 1-19 and expectant mothers Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm (541) 257-2006 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 257-2006 Emergency (800) 525-6800 After-hours INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance, but insurance is not required for services DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Care Referrals Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care General Dentistry Oral Health Education/Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOHNSON DENTAL CLINIC
